## Meeting Purpose

[Review the first blog draft and introduce the new AI visibility dashboard.](https://fathom.video/share/YLUsThS8iizFnGW25d7ULskyTmBE9sB-?tab=summary&timestamp=44.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [The first blog draft's tone is too rigid; it will be rewritten to be more conversational and dynamic.](https://fathom.video/share/YLUsThS8iizFnGW25d7ULskyTmBE9sB-?tab=summary&timestamp=68.0)
  - [GrowthX will create a 15–20 article backlog to support a 5-article/week publishing cadence, starting with 3 next week.](https://fathom.video/share/YLUsThS8iizFnGW25d7ULskyTmBE9sB-?tab=summary&timestamp=469.0)
  - [The new Scrunch dashboard will track N-able's AI visibility (links, mentions) across LLMs, starting at 0% citations.](https://fathom.video/share/YLUsThS8iizFnGW25d7ULskyTmBE9sB-?tab=summary&timestamp=535.0)
  - [The 1,600-word blog length is justified for SEO comprehensiveness; general "what is" content may be moved to the Cyber Encyclopedia.](https://fathom.video/share/YLUsThS8iizFnGW25d7ULskyTmBE9sB-?tab=summary&timestamp=1159.0)

## Topics

### First Blog Draft Feedback

  - [**Topic:** Incident Response Automation](https://fathom.video/share/YLUsThS8iizFnGW25d7ULskyTmBE9sB-?tab=summary&timestamp=104.0)
  - [**Feedback (Elaine):**](https://fathom.video/share/YLUsThS8iizFnGW25d7ULskyTmBE9sB-?tab=summary&timestamp=68.0)
      - [**Tone:** Too rigid and robotic.](https://fathom.video/share/YLUsThS8iizFnGW25d7ULskyTmBE9sB-?tab=summary&timestamp=68.0)
      - [**Headers:** Repetitive use of the target keyword ("incident response automation").](https://fathom.video/share/YLUsThS8iizFnGW25d7ULskyTmBE9sB-?tab=summary&timestamp=97.0)
  - [**Action (GrowthX):**](https://fathom.video/share/YLUsThS8iizFnGW25d7ULskyTmBE9sB-?tab=summary&timestamp=119.0)
      - [Rewrite the draft with a conversational, professional tone.](https://fathom.video/share/YLUsThS8iizFnGW25d7ULskyTmBE9sB-?tab=summary&timestamp=119.0)
      - [Update writing guidelines to prevent this issue.](https://fathom.video/share/YLUsThS8iizFnGW25d7ULskyTmBE9sB-?tab=summary&timestamp=142.0)
      - [Create two versions for comparison.](https://fathom.video/share/YLUsThS8iizFnGW25d7ULskyTmBE9sB-?tab=summary&timestamp=173.0)
  - [**Technical Note:** Correct product name is "N-able N-central" (no apostrophe).](https://fathom.video/share/YLUsThS8iizFnGW25d7ULskyTmBE9sB-?tab=summary&timestamp=273.0)

### Content Strategy & Backlog

  - [**Goal:** Create a 15–20 article backlog to support a 5-article/week publishing cadence.](https://fathom.video/share/YLUsThS8iizFnGW25d7ULskyTmBE9sB-?tab=summary&timestamp=469.0)
  - [**Rationale:** A large backlog ensures a consistent publishing schedule.](https://fathom.video/share/YLUsThS8iizFnGW25d7ULskyTmBE9sB-?tab=summary&timestamp=469.0)
  - [**Action (N-able):** Review and approve blog ideas in the "Considering" section of the shared document.](https://fathom.video/share/YLUsThS8iizFnGW25d7ULskyTmBE9sB-?tab=summary&timestamp=469.0)
  - [**Content Length:**](https://fathom.video/share/YLUsThS8iizFnGW25d7ULskyTmBE9sB-?tab=summary&timestamp=1159.0)
      - [The 1,600-word draft is standard for SEO comprehensiveness.](https://fathom.video/share/YLUsThS8iizFnGW25d7ULskyTmBE9sB-?tab=summary&timestamp=1298.0)
      - [GrowthX recommends a minimum of 1,200–1,300 words to cover subtopics and build semantic relationships.](https://fathom.video/share/YLUsThS8iizFnGW25d7ULskyTmBE9sB-?tab=summary&timestamp=1298.0)
  - [**Content Placement:**](https://fathom.video/share/YLUsThS8iizFnGW25d7ULskyTmBE9sB-?tab=summary&timestamp=1199.0)
      - [General "what is" content may be moved to the Cyber Encyclopedia directory.](https://fathom.video/share/YLUsThS8iizFnGW25d7ULskyTmBE9sB-?tab=summary&timestamp=1199.0)
      - [The main blog will focus on thought leadership and deeper topics.](https://fathom.video/share/YLUsThS8iizFnGW25d7ULskyTmBE9sB-?tab=summary&timestamp=1253.0)

### New Tool: Scrunch AI Visibility Dashboard

  - [**Purpose:** Track N-able's AI visibility (links, mentions) across LLMs (Claude, Gemini, etc.).](https://fathom.video/share/YLUsThS8iizFnGW25d7ULskyTmBE9sB-?tab=summary&timestamp=559.0)
  - [**Method:** Pings LLMs with 175+ prompts to simulate user queries.](https://fathom.video/share/YLUsThS8iizFnGW25d7ULskyTmBE9sB-?tab=summary&timestamp=575.0)
  - [**Key Metrics:**](https://fathom.video/share/YLUsThS8iizFnGW25d7ULskyTmBE9sB-?tab=summary&timestamp=868.0)
      - [**Citations:** % of responses with a link to N-able's site.](https://fathom.video/share/YLUsThS8iizFnGW25d7ULskyTmBE9sB-?tab=summary&timestamp=868.0)
          - [**Baseline:** 0% for N-able (expected).](https://fathom.video/share/YLUsThS8iizFnGW25d7ULskyTmBE9sB-?tab=summary&timestamp=986.0)
          - [**Benchmark:** 2–10% for established clients.](https://fathom.video/share/YLUsThS8iizFnGW25d7ULskyTmBE9sB-?tab=summary&timestamp=891.0)
          - [**Driver:** A large library of educational content establishes a site as an "answer-rich resource."](https://fathom.video/share/YLUsThS8iizFnGW25d7ULskyTmBE9sB-?tab=summary&timestamp=915.0)
      - [**Presence:** % of responses mentioning the N-able brand.](https://fathom.video/share/YLUsThS8iizFnGW25d7ULskyTmBE9sB-?tab=summary&timestamp=1014.0)
  - [**Limitation:** Claude's default setting does not cite sources, which skews its citation rate to 0% for all tracked entities.](https://fathom.video/share/YLUsThS8iizFnGW25d7ULskyTmBE9sB-?tab=summary&timestamp=1055.0)
  - [**Action (GrowthX):** Send N-able a PDF report and the full list of tracked prompts.](https://fathom.video/share/YLUsThS8iizFnGW25d7ULskyTmBE9sB-?tab=summary&timestamp=1126.0)

### AI Citation Strategy

  - [**Question (Andrew):** What drives AI citations?](https://fathom.video/share/YLUsThS8iizFnGW25d7ULskyTmBE9sB-?tab=summary&timestamp=1409.0)
  - [**Answer (GrowthX):**](https://fathom.video/share/YLUsThS8iizFnGW25d7ULskyTmBE9sB-?tab=summary&timestamp=1409.0)
      - [**Topic Clusters:** Builds topical authority, which increases LLM referral traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/YLUsThS8iizFnGW25d7ULskyTmBE9sB-?tab=summary&timestamp=1457.0)
      - [**Standard SEO:** Good practices (FAQs, tables) also improve visibility.](https://fathom.video/share/YLUsThS8iizFnGW25d7ULskyTmBE9sB-?tab=summary&timestamp=1518.0)
      - [**Content Length:** Less critical than comprehensiveness. A shorter page can be cited if it fully answers the user's intent.](https://fathom.video/share/YLUsThS8iizFnGW25d7ULskyTmBE9sB-?tab=summary&timestamp=1553.0)
  - [**Future Research:** GrowthX is compiling a report on AI citation factors, due by EOY.](https://fathom.video/share/YLUsThS8iizFnGW25d7ULskyTmBE9sB-?tab=summary&timestamp=1682.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/YLUsThS8iizFnGW25d7ULskyTmBE9sB-?tab=summary&timestamp=119.0)
      - [Rewrite the "Incident Response Automation" blog for a more conversational tone.](https://fathom.video/share/YLUsThS8iizFnGW25d7ULskyTmBE9sB-?tab=summary&timestamp=119.0)
      - [Create a pipeline in Atlas for the blog's featured image.](https://fathom.video/share/YLUsThS8iizFnGW25d7ULskyTmBE9sB-?tab=summary&timestamp=321.0)
      - [Send N-able a PDF of the Scrunch report and the list of tracked prompts.](https://fathom.video/share/YLUsThS8iizFnGW25d7ULskyTmBE9sB-?tab=summary&timestamp=1126.0)
  - [**N-able:**](https://fathom.video/share/YLUsThS8iizFnGW25d7ULskyTmBE9sB-?tab=summary&timestamp=469.0)
      - [Review and approve blog ideas in the "Considering" section to build the content backlog.](https://fathom.video/share/YLUsThS8iizFnGW25d7ULskyTmBE9sB-?tab=summary&timestamp=469.0)
